changeSet.author: mercotrace

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*)::text FROM trader WHERE id = 101
SELECT COUNT(*)::text FROM chart_of_account WHERE trader_id = 101

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO chart_of_account (id, trader_id, ledger_name, accounting_class, classification, parent_control_id, contact_id, is_system, is_locked, opening_balance, current_balance, created_by, created_date) VALUES (nextval('sequence_generator'), 101, 'Cash', 'ASSET', 'CASH', NULL, NULL, true, false, 0, 0, 'system-bootstrap', current_timestamp), (nextval('sequence_generator'), 101, 'Accounts Receivable – Control', 'ASSET', 'CONTROL', NULL, NULL, true, false, 0, 0, 'system-bootstrap', current_timestamp), (nextval('sequence_generator'), 101, 'Accounts Payable – Control', 'LIABILITY', 'CONTROL', NULL, NULL, true, false, 0, 0, 'system-bootstrap', current_timestamp);
